experiment: 2-tile BF16 GEMM via Peano — correct multi-tile data distribution
matrix: A[8x8] @ B[8x16] = C[8x16] — col-split across 2 tiles
toolchain: IRON (mlir-aie) + Peano (LLVM-AIE) — COMPLETELY OPEN-SOURCE, NO CHESS
data_distribution: TensorAccessPattern with 2D strides [N, 1] for non-contiguous row-major slices
milestone: First correct multi-tile BF16 GEMM through complete open-source compiler stack. Two AIE2P tiles running aie::mmul intrinsics compiled via Peano, with proper data distribution via TensorAccessPattern.
